name: Holo Hub
summary: The store for everything you can run discover, try, own and run every holo-native thing by its verified identity, 100% serverless, for people and AI agents alike.

description.p: A product here is a holo app: its identity is its content address (did:holo κ), so the store shows verifiable truth every item re-derives in your tab to prove it is genuine (Law L5).
Opening an item renders the live thing from its address, in place try before you own, no install. Stores nest inside stores, endlessly, each still verifying itself.
The commerce model is Medusa, adopted as a byte-pinned contract and compiled to run in-tab never a server. Owning mints a portable title you hold; paying settles through the wallet.
One experience, two audiences: every screen a person uses has an equal door for an AI agent. Powered by on-device Holo Q. Built on the open semantic web (schema.org / W3C).
